title: The 30-Minute VO2max Blitz
description: Maximum training stimulus in minimal time
purpose: Maximum training stimulus in minimal time

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 8 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/8. Target: 130% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 1min at 130%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/8. 130% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/8.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/8. 6 to go. You've accumulated 1min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/8. You're building something real here. 6 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/8. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2/7. 130%, 95-100 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 29% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 1:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/8. You're 33% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/8. 130% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/8. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 3/7. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 130% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 37% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes of work done. 16 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 1min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 130% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 12 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 4min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 1:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 48% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 48% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 48% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. 130% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 51% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 51% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 55% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 1:00 at 130%. Then 1:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 55% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 55% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. 130% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 9 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 7: 130% FTP. You're 17 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 6 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 130% for 1:00. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 18 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 90-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 5:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 65% for 5:00. 90-100 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 23 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
